_meta.purpose: SKU & attribute validation payloads — one product per category, all attribute types covered
_meta.format_version: v2 — matches ManualQAPartner real payload format (is_partner string, sku/sku_gen as {key,value} objects, line_items wrapper, estimated_shipping_date)

categories.wood-hoods: Payloads 1–39 — VEN-CCX for all modifier + color tests; VEN-MCX, VEN-ANBS, VEN-DBC, VEN-BNT for product-type coverage
categories.quick-shipping: Payloads 15–17 (per-product default colors) + 45–51 (VEN-QSPCCX × all 7 partner color groups)
categories.floating-shelves: Payloads 18–20 + 40–44 (all 7 SelectWidth sizes) + 52–57 (VEN-FLS FSW30 × all 6 missing color groups)

attribute_coverage.IncreaseDepth: ID19-RSH, ID20-RSH, ID22-RSH covered (007, 026, 027); ID18-RSH is the default/no-modifier state
attribute_coverage.CrownMolding: MSCI, MGCI, INC, CLS all covered (028, 029, 008, 009)
attribute_coverage.Colors_USCD: USCDSHW (003, 017, 052), USCDSAW (014, 045) — Wood Hoods, Quick Ship, Floating Shelves
attribute_coverage.SelectWidth: FSW24–FSW42 all 7 values covered (018–019 + 040–044); color groups tested on FSW30 (052–057)

_meta.note: Verify product_id values match the partner site WP IDs before running. IDs here are from the Connector Platform catalog.

scenarios.attribute_focus: Smoke — RAW base finish, standard size (36x36)
scenarios.description: Minimal valid wood hood. Validates product_id, base RAW color segment, size segment, and product_cat slug.

scenarios.attribute_focus: PRM (Primed / Paint Ready) base finish, size 30x36
scenarios.description: Validates the PRM color segment and a different size (3036). PRM is the second base finish alongside RAW.
Validates USCD partner-specific color SKU. USCD colors are prefixed USCD* and must exist in the PartnerColors attribute mapping.
Validates a Hoodsly painted color SKU (long-form HOOANT00001 format) on a large size (4836).

scenarios.attribute_focus: TA Cabinetry partner color — Dove White (TADOV00001), 36x36
scenarios.description: Validates TA Cabinetry partner color SKU. Tests a third partner color group to ensure all color prefixes are registered.
Validates the ReduceHeight modifier SKU (RH2) appended after color. Segment order: size → color → RH*.
Validates the IncreaseDepth modifier (ID19-RSH). Segment order: size → color → ID*-RSH (depth comes before reduce height).
Validates Crown Molding Installed modifier (INC). Segment order: color → [ID] → [RH] → INC/CLS.

scenarios.attribute_focus: Modifier — Crown Molding Loose / Not Installed (CLS)
scenarios.description: Validates Crown Molding Loose modifier (CLS) as the alternative to INC. Both CLS and INC must be recognized.
Validates Extend Chimney modifier (CH6). Segment order: color → [ID] → [RH] → [crown] → CH*.
Validates Solid Bottom modifier (SB). SB is the last segment in the SKU formula. Segment order: color → [all others] → SB.

scenarios.attribute_focus: ALL modifiers combined — full segment order validation
scenarios.description: Every modifier stacked in correct segment order: ID19-RSH → RH2 → INC → CH6 → SB. Tests that Hub parses each segment in order without confusion.

scenarios.attribute_focus: Large size (48x36) — validates wider size segment
scenarios.description: Validates size segment 4836 on a wood hood. Confirms Hub maps wider sizes (48") correctly without a SKU missing error.

scenarios.attribute_focus: USCD color + Increase Depth + Chimney Extension — multi-modifier with partner color
scenarios.description: USCD partner color combined with two modifiers (ID19-RSH, CH6). Tests that partner color SKUs work correctly in combination with modifiers.
Validates the standard Curved Quick Ship product. Quick-ship products have fixed size/color and no modifiers. estimated_shipping_date is same day (0 day lead time).

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-QSPCCR — Curved With Strapping Quick Ship, RAW, 30x36
scenarios.description: Validates the Curved With Strapping Quick Ship variant (VEN-QSPCCR, id: 5070). Tests a different quick-ship product with RAW finish.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-QSPCCXWHT — Curved Shaker White Quick Ship (USCD), USCDSHW, 30x36
scenarios.description: Validates the USCD-specific Shaker White quick-ship product (VEN-QSPCCXWHT, id: 5072). Tests USCD color on a quick-ship product.
Validates floating shelf with 30" SelectWidth (FSW30) and RAW finish. Floating shelves use SelectWidth instead of Size — this is the most common shelf width.
Validates floating shelf with 36" SelectWidth (FSW36) and PRM finish. Tests a different width segment to confirm FSW* variants are all registered in Hub.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — SelectWidth FSW30, Hoodsly Natural Stain (HOONAT00001)
scenarios.description: Validates floating shelf with a Hoodsly stained color (HOONAT00001). Tests that partner stain colors are valid for floating shelves, not just painted options.
Validates the minimum ReduceHeight segment RH1. Completes single-step RH coverage.
Validates RH3 — mid-range ReduceHeight segment.
Validates RH4 ReduceHeight segment.
Validates RH5 ReduceHeight segment.

scenarios.attribute_focus: Modifier - Reduce Height RH6 (Remove 6") — maximum reduction
scenarios.description: Validates the maximum ReduceHeight segment RH6. Closes out all 6 RH values.
Validates the ID20-RSH IncreaseDepth segment. Paired with PRM color.

scenarios.attribute_focus: Modifier - Increase Depth ID22-RSH (to 22.5") — maximum depth
scenarios.description: Validates the maximum IncreaseDepth segment ID22-RSH. Closes out all depth options.
Validates the Steel Crown Molding segment MSCI. Distinct from INC/CLS which are crown install states.
Validates the Brass Crown Molding segment MGCI. Closes out all 4 CrownMolding values.
Validates the 12" chimney extension segment CH12.
Validates the maximum chimney extension segment CH24. Closes out all 3 ExtendChimney values.
First Jarlin partner color test. Validates JARSTE00001 color SKU prefix registration in PartnerColors.

scenarios.attribute_focus: Jim Bishop partner color — Alabaster Paint (JBALP), 36x36
scenarios.description: First Jim Bishop partner color test. Validates JBALP color SKU prefix registration.
First Homemark partner color test. Validates HOMWHP color SKU prefix registration.
First JSI partner color test. Validates JSIESW color SKU prefix registration. Closes out all 6 partner color groups.
Validates the Tapered (MCX) product SKU with a different product base segment.

scenarios.attribute_focus: Product coverage — VEN-ANBS (Angled With Brass Strapping), RAW, 36x36
scenarios.description: Validates the ANBS product base segment. Smoke test product in the catalog.
Validates the Double Curved (DBC) product base segment. Uses the newest product id 5082.
Validates the Box Straight (BNT) product base segment with PRM color.
Validates the minimum SelectWidth segment FSW24 for Floating Shelves.
Validates FSW27 with PRM color on Floating Shelves.
Validates FSW33 SelectWidth segment on Floating Shelves.
Validates FSW39 SelectWidth segment on Floating Shelves.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-QSPCCX — USCD color (Shaker Antique White, USCDSAW), 30x36
scenarios.description: Validates a USCD partner color on a Quick Ship product. Uses USCDSAW to differentiate from the USCDSHW already on QSPCCXWHT.
Validates a Hoodsly painted color on a Quick Ship product.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-QSPCCX — TA Cabinetry color (Dove White, TADOV00001), 30x36
scenarios.description: Validates a TA Cabinetry partner color on a Quick Ship product.
Validates a Jarlin partner color on a Quick Ship product.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-QSPCCX — Jim Bishop color (Alabaster Paint, JBALP), 30x36
scenarios.description: Validates a Jim Bishop partner color on a Quick Ship product.
Validates a Homemark partner color on a Quick Ship product.
Validates a JSI partner color on a Quick Ship product. Closes out all 7 partner color groups for Quick Shipping.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — USCD color (Shaker White, USCDSHW), FSW30
scenarios.description: Validates a USCD partner color on a Floating Shelf product.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — TA Cabinetry color (Dove White, TADOV00001), FSW30
scenarios.description: Validates a TA Cabinetry partner color on a Floating Shelf product.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — Jarlin color (Sterling Gray, JARSTE00001), FSW30
scenarios.description: Validates a Jarlin partner color on a Floating Shelf product.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — Jim Bishop color (Alabaster Paint, JBALP), FSW30
scenarios.description: Validates a Jim Bishop partner color on a Floating Shelf product.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — Homemark color (White Paint, HOMWHP), FSW30
scenarios.description: Validates a Homemark partner color on a Floating Shelf product.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — JSI color (Essex White, JSIESW), FSW30
scenarios.description: Validates a JSI partner color on a Floating Shelf product. Closes out all 7 partner color groups for all 3 categories.

scenarios.attribute_focus: VEN-FLS — SelectWidth FSW42 (42"), PRM — maximum width
scenarios.description: Validates the maximum SelectWidth segment FSW42 with PRM. Closes out all 7 SelectWidth values.
